faqs.question: What pests are most common in Great Kills homes?
faqs.answer: Great Kills residents typically deal with ants, cockroaches, spiders, silverfish, and occasional rodent activity. The waterfront location can also attract mosquitoes and flies during warmer months. Our general pest control service addresses all these common household pests with comprehensive interior and exterior treatments.
